## Summary

Refreshes ROADMAP.md v12.2 goal #1 (Cloud-Native Knowledge & Multi-Tenant Memory Core) to reflect the sub-tickets that merged during 2026-04-20.

## Changes

- **Sub-epic [#10015](https://github.com/neomjs/neo/issues/10015) Dynamic Topology** — checkbox flipped from `[ ]` to `[x]`. Client-side routing ([#10001](https://github.com/neomjs/neo/issues/10001)) and lifecycle bypass ([#10007](https://github.com/neomjs/neo/issues/10007)) both merged. Playwright coverage in [#10008](https://github.com/neomjs/neo/issues/10008) / [#10009](https://github.com/neomjs/neo/issues/10009) explicitly marked as deferred follow-up polish (not a release blocker).
- **Sub-epic [#10016](https://github.com/neomjs/neo/issues/10016) Multi-Tenant Identity & Data Privacy** — [#10000](https://github.com/neomjs/neo/issues/10000) now marked merged with a one-line summary of what landed (JWT-claim identity propagation via new `RequestContextService` singleton, per-tenant write tags + read filters + tenant-safe `deleteAllSummaries`). [#10010](https://github.com/neomjs/neo/issues/10010) / [#10011](https://github.com/neomjs/neo/issues/10011) / [#10017](https://github.com/neomjs/neo/issues/10017) remain queued with explicit capability summaries.

## Test plan

Documentation-only change — no code paths affected. Verified:

- [x] All 7 cross-referenced issue IDs resolve
- [x] No commercial-partner references (per the CRITICAL confidentiality feedback memory)
- [x] Checkbox state reflects current reality: #10015 = done (minus optional Playwright coverage), #10016 = in-progress (1/4 merged)

## Related

- Continues the #9748 ROADMAP maintenance cadence established by PR #10122
- Reflects merges from PR #10121 (#10001), PR #10123 (#10007), PR #10124 (klarso scrub), PR #10128 (#10000), PR #10122 (earlier ROADMAP update itself)
- Follow-up tickets filed this session and parented under #9999 via `update_issue_relationship`: #10125 (engine/architecture drift — standalone), #10126 (engines.neo missing — standalone), #10127 (HealthService topology reporting — parented #9999), #10129 (backup substrate atomic-bundle rewrite — parented #9999)

Resolves a maintenance-cadence check on #9748 (the "ROADMAP state sync" follow-up flagged in PR #10122's body as something worth formalizing into a chore schedule).
